summary: The diff shows frontend changes to the admin registration hooks and project state updates, but the critical backend fix for REQ-1 is not clearly visible. The backend/main.mo file is truncated and does not show the actual registerFirstAdmin function implementation with the zero-admin bypass condition. The frontend hook useRegisterInitialAdmin correctly calls actor.registerFirstAdmin, but the core requirement — the conditional bypass in the backend — cannot be confirmed from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The registerFirstAdmin function must bypass the admin-only auth guard when no admins exist (admin count == 0), and enforce the normal admin-only guard when one or more admins already exist.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the registerFirstAdmin function implementation. There is no visible evidence of a check for zero admin count before bypassing auth, the conditional guard logic, or the normal admin-only guard being enforced when admins exist. The project_state.json still shows the feature request as pending status.
